title: [v2.2] Cirrus: Skip most tests on tag-push
body: Cherry-picked update from master, modified slightly to limit which tasks run during branch and tag testing.  Necessary to address [cirrus-cron invoked  failure.](https://cirrus-ci.com/build/5817365495545856).

comments.body: Ref: [Results from simulated tag-push CI run](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6328169747709952) - expectation was the problematic 'smoke' job would be skipped and all other important things would pass.  They did.
